emails.shortDescription: Feature Instagram reel (@bigbluelogox). LogOX partnered with Timberwolf + expert advisory board to build the Summit. Dan-D-Lift lifts logs up to 275 lbs. First half: reel + brand story. Second half: product push.

emails.theme: Fuel Angle: Cut Your Own, Save Thousands
emails.shortDescription: What a typical household spent on heating oil this winter vs. cutting your own firewood. The 3-in-1 makes the work fast and easy on your back. Lead with dollar savings, close with the tool.
emails.notes: Educational hook, conversion close. Fresh 3-in-1 angle.

emails.shortDescription: Limited quantity, back by popular demand. Handmade in USA by LT Wright master bladesmiths. A2 tool steel, Scandi grind, fire steel included. Proven revenue driver. Include real reviews. Position as Father's Day gift.
emails.notes: Good past revenue. Reviews from product page. Limited quantity scarcity angle.

emails.shortDescription: 1 week out. Code DAD26, 15% off Sling and Hearth Bin. Fresh messaging. Gift angle: tools he'll use every winter, not just once. Urgency: Father's Day is next Sunday.
emails.notes: Fresh messaging, not a copy of May emails.

emails.shortDescription: Showcase top sellers from actual Shopify sales data. Social proof angle: what your fellow wood burners are buying right now.
2 days before Father's Day. Last chance for DAD26. This Sunday is Father's Day. This is the last time we're running this. Strongest urgency of the month.
emails.notes: Short, urgent, no fluff. Final push for DAD26.

emails.shortDescription: The attachment nobody knows about. Spear and move log rounds without bending. Aircraft aluminum. $49.95 entry point, easy conversion. Cross-sell to existing 3-in-1 owners.
emails.notes: Never had a dedicated email. Target existing 3-in-1 owners.

emails.shortDescription: 100% reusable fire lighter. No kindling, no paper, no wasted effort. Handcrafted ceramic jar + fire stone. $169.95 qualifies for free shipping. Never been featured.
emails.notes: New product, never featured. Close the month with something fresh.
